who: medical clinics processing 20–50 patient intake forms/month
offer: For medical clinics processing 20–50 patient intake forms/month, inefficient manual generation causes billing delays. We automate form generation and submission instead of manual form generation and submission by staff.
problem: Inefficient manual generation and submission of patient intake forms
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical clinics seeking solutions
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 clinics with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among clinics
try_it: Let users try template-based form generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing patient data
